creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@broadpark.no
text:
The mod_ruby port (version 1.2.6) installs docs in /usr/local/share/doc/ruby18/mod_ruby, but pkg-message claims that the docs will be found in /usr/local/share/doc/ruby/mod_ruby.

Fix: 

Either fix the information in pkg-message, or fix the install location for docs.
Submirtter doesn't which is correct.
How-To-Repeat: 

1. install port
2. observer that pkg-message and docs location doesn't match.
